nav.backupServerDesc: Connected to {server}. The primary server is unavailable.

anomalyChartsDesc: 14-day view of monitor, sync and backup errors, plus detected auto-cleanups.
dbWithoutRedisDesc: ActiveStream records are present in the database but missing from the Redis cache.
excludedLibrariesDesc: Libraries completely ignored for logs and analytics.
logHealthDesc: Overview of the monitor, orphan sessions, auto-closures and excluded libraries.

multiServerComparator.desc: Compare current load, transcoding pressure and heartbeat freshness across Jellyfin servers.
multiServerComparator.disabled: This view requires multi-server mode. Set JELLYTRACK_MODE=multi to enable.
multiServerComparator.title: Multi-server Comparator

orphanPlaybacksDesc: Entries marked open but without an active playback stream.
playbackHistoryNote: PlaybackHistory open without an associated ActiveStream.
recentClosuresDesc: Summary of cleanups performed by monitor, sync and backups.
redisOrphanDesc: Redis keys referencing streams without a corresponding ActiveStream.

settings.overviewSummaryDesc: Quick summary of settings and states (e.g., plugin connected, recent backups, scheduled tasks).
settings.quickActionsDesc: Buttons and shortcuts for frequent actions.
settings.maxConcurrentTranscodesDesc: 0 = disabled. Alert if the number exceeds this threshold.
settings.quickActionsBackupDesc: Create an immediate backup or export the current database state.
settings.quickActionsRestoreDesc: Load a backup JSON file then restore the database.
settings.backupHistoryDesc: Restore or delete an existing backup.
settings.confirmRestoreBackup: Restoring will replace your current database. Continue?

media.audioFormatsDesc: Distribution by audio codec (based on playbacks).
media.deepStatsOverviewDesc: Advanced analysis of your media collection.
media.genreDiversityDesc: Distribution of media by genre (top categories).
media.noMedia: No indexed media. Don't forget to run the Jellyfin sync in Settings.
media.title: Collection
